articles.title: 天生條件還是成長環境？最新研究揭示，宇宙初期星系大小就已由「出身地」決定

articles.title: Ethereum analysts say ‘downside pressure’ remains as $1.8K becomes key
articles.description: Analysts warn Ether’s downside risks remain elevated as traders closely watch the $1,800 support zone for stability.

articles.title: Mass deployment of AI agents is a disaster waiting to happen, says CertiK CEO
articles.description: Ronghui Gu shares tips on how to isolate AI agents while testing them so they do not have access to critical personal information or digital assets.

articles.title: Clarity Act Risks Regulation Without Oversight, Brookings Fellow Says
articles.description: As Congress weighs crypto legislation, Aaron Klein says the CFTC needs more resources, independence and coordination to oversee digital markets.

articles.title: Live markets: Bitcoin shrugs off early decline, but two-month winning streak is in jeopardy
articles.description: A hopeful posting on Iran from President Trump helped erase morning losses.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs bleed $2.8B in record nine-day outflow streak
articles.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a nine-day outflow streak totaling $2.84 billion, surpassing an eight-session outflow run in February 2025.

articles.title: Today is the last day to apply to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026

articles.title: What American crypto asset perpetuals mean for the future of crypto
articles.description: For years, one of the most significant crypto asset markets has existed entirely outside the United States. Today, that changes, explains CFTC Chairman Selig.

articles.title: U.S. CFTC opens crypto 'perp' door with first approvals at Kalshi, Coinbase
articles.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has now established a stance on how regulated U.S. firms can engage in crypto perpetual futures contracts.

articles.title: Why is Stellar's XLM up by over 50% this week?
articles.description: XLM rallied after US financial giant DTCC announced a partnership with the Stellar Network, but it still risks a sharp downside in the coming weeks.

articles.title: NYSE parent ICE pushes ‘level playing field’ for 24/7 onchain perps
articles.description: ICE’s CEO said regulators need to create a “level playing field” for launching 24/7 onchain perps contracts, which are already trading on exchanges such as Hyperliquid.

articles.title: Kiwibit’s AI-powered bird feeder is my new backyard buddy

articles.title: Paxos wins SEC approval to clear U.S. stocks on blockchain
articles.description: Paxos new license positions it alongside legacy giants such as DTCC and makes it a compelling, more efficient alternative for traditional finance giants than legacy competitors.

articles.title: Bitcoin falls out of the global top 10 assets as market cap dips below $1.5T
articles.description: Bitcoin’s market cap has dropped below $1.5 trillion, pushing it out of the world’s top 10 assets amid AI stock and precious metal rallies.

articles.title: Hyperliquid bigger than NASDAQ, says ICE CEO Jeffrey Sprecher

articles.title: Strategy situation ‘out of hand,’ says Arca exec on $15B preferred stock burden

articles.title: This chip startup just raised $135M on a bet that AI’s biggest bottleneck isn’t compute — it’s memory
